title: What kind of shopping does the writer enjoy, do you think?

meanings.usage: 形容人的行为或言语不礼貌
用于反射影像的玻璃制品
形容当代的或新式的物品
海岸边指引船只的塔状建筑
此处形容帽子形状像灯塔

phrases.usage: 表示不必如此粗鲁，用于表达对他人不礼貌行为的不满

examples.en: You needn't be so rude about it.

phrases.phrase: looked at herself in the mirror
phrases.usage: 照镜子，描述看着镜中的自己

examples.en: My wife looked at herself in the mirror.
examples.zh: 我妻子看着镜中的自己。

examples.en: We mustn't buy things we don't need.
examples.zh: 我们不应该买不需要的东西。

phrases.usage: 表示本不必说（但已经说了），带有后悔意味

examples.en: I regretted saying it almost at once. You needn't have said that.
examples.zh: 我几乎立刻就后悔说了那句话。你本不必说的。

phrases.phrase: A man can never have too many ties
phrases.usage: 男人永远不会嫌领带太多（自我安慰的话）

examples.en: A man can never have too many ties.
examples.zh: 男人永远不会嫌领带太多。

examples.en: Ten minutes later we walked out of the shop together.
examples.zh: 十分钟后我们一起走出了商店。

phrases.usage: 戴着帽子，描述穿戴状态

examples.en: My wife was wearing a hat that looked like a lighthouse!
examples.zh: 我妻子戴着一顶看起来像灯塔的帽子！

examples.en: My wife was still in front of the mirror.
I sat down on one of those modern chairs.
examples.zh: 我坐在一把现代化的椅子上。

phrases.usage: 我不需要提醒你（暗示对方应该记得）

examples.en: I needn't remind you of that terrible tie you bought yesterday.
examples.zh: 我不需要提醒你那条昨天买的糟糕领带。

grammar.title: needn't have + 过去分词
grammar.definition: 表示本不必做某事（但实际上已经做了），含有后悔或责备的意味
grammar.structure: 主语 + needn't have + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于表达做了不必要的事情，语气中带有遗憾

examples.en: I needn't have worried about you.
She needn't have bought so much food.
examples.zh: 她本不必买那么多食物的。

grammar.title: mustn't 与 needn't 的区别
grammar.definition: mustn't表示禁止（不允许），needn't表示不必要（不需要）
grammar.usage: 两者含义完全不同，mustn't表示规则或命令禁止做某事，needn't表示没有义务做某事

examples.en: We mustn't buy things we don't need.
examples.zh: 我们不可以买不需要的东西。

grammar.title: can't have too many + 名词
grammar.definition: 永远不会嫌...太多（表示对某物的喜爱或追求）
grammar.structure: can't have too many + 可数名词复数
grammar.usage: 用于表达对某类物品的喜好，强调想要更多

examples.en: A man can never have too many ties.
examples.zh: 男人永远不会嫌领带太多。

examples.en: You can't have too many friends.

original.en: You needn't be so rude about it.

sentencePatterns.pattern: You needn't have + 过去分词

imitations.en: You needn't have bought that expensive watch.
imitations.zh: 你本不必买那块昂贵的手表。

imitations.en: You needn't have waited for me.

sentencePatterns.pattern: A man can never have too many + 可数名词复数

original.en: A man can never have too many ties.
original.zh: 男人永远不会嫌领带太多。

imitations.en: A girl can never have too many shoes.
imitations.zh: 女孩子永远不会嫌鞋子太多。

imitations.en: One can never have too much knowledge.
imitations.zh: 人永远不会嫌知识太多。

original.en: What kind of shopping does the writer enjoy, do you think?
original.zh: 你认为作者喜欢什么样的购物？

imitations.en: What kind of music do you enjoy, do you think?
imitations.zh: 你认为他喜欢什么样的音乐？

imitations.en: What kind of food do you prefer, do you think?
imitations.zh: 你认为她喜欢什么样的食物？
